title: eriogonum tiehmii
intro: Eriogonum tiehmii, also known as Tiehm's buckwheat, is a species of flowering plant in the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae) that is native to Nevada in the United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eriogonum tiehmii include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as promoting wound healing and immune system function. Eriogonum tiehmii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
